# Spatial layers analysis dependencies
# Install with: pip install -r requirements.txt

# Core dependencies
scanpy>=1.9.0
anndata>=0.8.0

pandas>=1.3.0
matplotlib>=3.5.0
seaborn>=0.11.0

# squidpy for spatial analysis
# NOTE: squidpy's sq.read.visium() was removed in 1.6+; use sc.read_visium() instead.
squidpy>=1.3.0

# Added after code review: used in statistical analysis
statsmodels>=0.13.0
